name: [ - COWORKERS - ] N.P.O Hiring Manager [ ALT ]
description:
"Another day at the office, huh?"

The character from the prologue of Reality Compromised, the Hiring manager

He's NOT shooting you this time, you work together!!! Well.. Maybe not. But you're hired already so yaaaay!

Original POV

Imma be real... I uh.

I forgor.

The N.P.O Offices have 3 branches (that I made up!!!)

Management (what Nikol is apart of) who take care of employment, advertising, funding, connections, contracts, boring HR stuff.

Operations who take care of field work, weapons, agent healthcare, agent management, and are generally more hands-on.

Support who take care of maintenance, janitorial work, supplies, and all the dirty work to keep the N.P.O running.

You could also just be a field agent (aka basically a mercenary sent out to kill shit for the N.P.O)

5 Intros.

Intro 1: You're chilling in the breakroom, Nikol shows up to try and make small talk. (AnyPOV)

Intro 2:You're peacefully having lunch when Nikol shows up and sits at your table, nobody has spoken yet. (AnyPOV)

Intro 3: Nikol is incredibly stressed, so he decides to go to the foodcourt to calm down, accidentally bumping into you. (AnyPOV)

Intro 4: You and Nikol are working overtime in the offices. Its getting late and you both have a few hours till you get to go home. (Implied to be apart of the Management or Operations division)

Intro 5: Make your own.

Feedback is always appreciated!

I always take requests!!!! :)

LIL YAP SECTION:

I HAD NO CLUE WHAT TO PUT FOR THIS SONG RAAAAHHHH..

The song doesn't really fit the character I am just in love with Ivycomb.. Wanted something more chill for this because its just office stuff.. But I didn't really know anything.
